title: Not a Cult
description: A community project for our beloved streamer, Voraktee (aka Mr. Finisher)
body:
# About **The comunity server for this modpack has been shut down until further notice! Please be sure to use the singleplayer version. You can download the server's world file [here](https://1drv.ms/u/c/3bb9a90ea53c1d3d/EUzGXd9moyRHhZ3ONiwcQ-cBDcFwahOwqGrZJPwGoFlGzg?e=1cnNXg) to explore or complete any unfinished builds.** Since this modpack was custom crafted for Voraktee's community server, a heavy focus was placed on performance to ensure even low spec PCs could participate in shenanigans. Most FPS lag can be fixed by changing your video settings and/or disabling shaders. Please be aware that many mods don’t have a wiki yet, so if you discover something cool, be sure to post it in [Voraktee’s Discord](https://discord.com/invite/ystWW6C)! Some of these mods also make the early game more challenging, so building a starter base is highly recommended! **[`Installation Guide`](https://tungsten-quill-a34.notion.site/Installation-Guide-47c5c1a168e24e10895c4ce8109f5e95?pvs=4) | [`Tutorials`](https://tungsten-quill-a34.notion.site/Not-a-Cult-Tutorials-a8957d912a3347818aa071fa13be8794?pvs=4) | [`Mod List`](https://tungsten-quill-a34.notion.site/9bed7cc0ff4147eeadfbfcd600932963?v=1c7178707ae747aa849a26733f10326a) | [`Donations`](https://ko-fi.com/beedeadly/goal)** ## Features - Performance Optimizations - Quality of Life Improvements - 220+ Biomes Across 4 Dimensions - Armors, Weapons, Tools, & Trinkets - Blocks, Foliage, & Decorations - Cute Creatures & Harmful Hostiles - Custom Vanilla+ Resourcepack - [Complementary Unbound Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound) ## Community
Server Moderators **UnlikeAlamo**\ **BeeDeadly**\ ***(More TBD)***
Content Creators **Voraktee**\ **BeeDeadly**\ **Blue_Moon**\ **Gotauros**\ **JackieRei**\ **Lokipellia**\ **Loyal_Leo**\ **TeruVision**\
